Source: Dia Security
URL: https://diabrowser.com/security
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Dia Browser Security

## Bug Bounty
Vulnerability disclosure via HackerOne (hackerone.com/bcny)

## Security Architecture
- Annual full-scope security assessments and code reviews
- Built on Chromium with aggressive upstream security patch schedule
- Weekly updates (Thursdays); critical vulnerabilities patched within 48 hours
- Disabled Chromium features: GAIA, UMA, profile sync, Reporting API, network logging

## Infrastructure
- Role-restricted production access with regular access reviews
- Data encrypted at rest and in transit

## Data Handling & Privacy
- Conversations, history, bookmarks stored locally encrypted on device
- Minimum necessary data sent to AI partners; contractual restrictions prevent retention/training
- Opt-in improvement data retained max 30 days (de-identified)
- Incognito mode stores nothing

## AI Safety Controls
- Blocks LLM-generated URLs
- Requires user approval for tool access
- Content previews before third-party insertion
- Reversible actions kept in draft status
- Agent navigation restricted between websites
- URL filtering for language models

## Content Retention
AI data retained only for security/compliance (content moderation, suspected misuse). Access-controlled, deleted when purpose expires, never used for training.
